chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.2574 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 25.02.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------- This criminal bail application was filed on 04.11.2024 and the record reflects that counsel for applicant remained absent on 08.11.2024, 09.12.2024 and 20.01.2025. Today, the position is same. Continuous absence of counsel for applicant shows that he has lost his interest to pursue the instant criminal bail application, therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. However, trial Court is directed to conclude the trial, preferably within a period of three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
